svg.text: State-first: the house as a control loop — signals and setpoints front and center. Rooms are demoted to navigation; a room detail view reuses Concept A's card.
sensors first: the regulator's inputs, with today's range
room detail reuses Concept A's card
not a strip across the top
house — one flat list, the family's levers
phone leads with Börvärden — the most
common family act is nudging a setpoint
Wireframe — grayscale is deliberate; visual design is a later pass. All labels from [naming].sv.
